name: Plan B Media Public Company Limited
summary: Plan B Media Public Company Limited provides advertising media production services in Thailand. Its services include out of home advertising media services, such as mass transit static outdoor advertising, digital outdoor advertising, airport advertising, in-mall advertising, retail and classic, and online advertising media services. The company also offers digital advertising agency, advertising space rental, and airtime rental services; and mobile software applications. In addition, it operates as an agency to sell and administrate the benefit contracts; manages and develops artists; operates as an advertising media design and production, and advertising agency; and offers billboard rental services. Further, the company organizes an esports tournament under the Thai E-League Pro name; and provides sports marketing services. It serves small and medium-sized enterprises, private companies, government agencies, or state enterprises. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
